message_text: I do want to clear this loan, but I cannot pay the full amount today.

I’m an AI agent for Nira, and this conversation is being logged. I understand you want to clear the Nira loan ending ****4831 but cannot pay the full amount today. I’ve noted that position and your existing hardship context. Since you’ve asked not to be contacted further, I will flag this for appropriate follow-up and end the assessment here.

Borrower stated position this turn: wants to clear the loan but cannot pay the full amount today. Existing case context indicates hardship signals (job loss, medical issue, student), cannot pay now, may pay later, and stop-contact flag is present. What was already asked/repeated: no new routing questions asked. Agent 2 should not repeat disclosures unnecessarily, should not re-verify identity, and should not restart assessment. Next priority: honor stop-contact boundary and handle account per policy with minimal or no further outreach."}

I’m still open to discussing a realistic payment plan, but if you can’t offer one, please stop contacting me.

The current policy allows only arrangements that complete within 30 days, and I cannot confirm exact approved plan or reduced-closure terms from the available data in this turn. Because you asked to stop contact if I cannot offer a realistic option now, I’ve recorded that request and your hardship context. No further outreach should occur unless a concrete approved option is available through the permitted process.
